_comment: Fred QA fixtures. Each fixture tests one pipeline path. Update source_url if a URL goes stale. PLACEHOLDERS marked with TODO must be replaced before running.

fixtures.description: Plain text — known TRUE fact (COVID pandemic declaration)
fixtures.input: The WHO declared COVID-19 a pandemic on 11 March 2020

fixtures.description: Plain text — confirmed TRUE historical fact (Mandela release)
fixtures.input: Nelson Mandela was released from prison on 11 February 1990 after 27 years

fixtures.description: Plain text — known FALSE claim (moon landing hoax)
fixtures.input: The 1969 moon landing was staged by NASA and never actually happened

fixtures.description: Plain text — known FALSE claim (5G/COVID)
fixtures.input: 5G towers were used to spread COVID-19

fixtures.description: Plain text — climate change denial claim
fixtures.input: 97% of scientists do not agree that climate change is caused by humans — that figure was made up

fixtures.description: Plain text — known FALSE election fraud claim (US 2020)
fixtures.input: The 2020 US presidential election was stolen through widespread voter fraud

fixtures.description: Plain text — misleading framing of a real statistic (vaccines)
fixtures.input: Vaccines kill more people than COVID

fixtures.description: Plain text — statistical cherry-pick (UK knife crime)
fixtures.input: Knife crime in the UK has risen every year since 2014
fixtures.notes: Partially true in some years, not every year — expects MISLEADING or NEEDS CONTEXT

fixtures.description: Plain text — claim that is true but missing critical context
fixtures.input: Israel has killed more people in Gaza than Hamas killed on October 7
fixtures.notes: Numerically verifiable but deeply context-dependent — expects NEEDS CONTEXT, MOSTLY TRUE or TRUE with caveats

fixtures.description: Plain text — contested claim where sources disagree (Ukraine)
fixtures.input: Ukraine attacked the Nord Stream pipeline in 2022
fixtures.notes: Attribution contested — multiple credible theories. Tests whether Fred picks sides or returns NEEDS CONTEXT/UNVERIFIABLE

fixtures.description: Plain text — health misinformation (ivermectin/COVID)
fixtures.input: Ivermectin was proven to cure COVID-19 but governments suppressed the evidence

fixtures.description: Plain text — famous misattributed quote (Einstein)
fixtures.input: Albert Einstein said 'The definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over and expecting different results'
fixtures.notes: Widely misattributed — Einstein never said this. Expects FALSE or MISLEADING.

fixtures.description: Plain text — genuinely unverifiable private claim
fixtures.input: The UK government has a secret plan to ban all protests by 2026

fixtures.description: Plain text — Arabic language input claim
fixtures.input: أعلنت منظمة الصحة العالمية أن كوفيد-19 جائحة في 11 مارس 2020
fixtures.notes: Arabic: WHO declared COVID-19 a pandemic on 11 March 2020. Tests non-English input handling.

fixtures.description: Plain text — claim requiring non-Western sources (Israel/Hamas)
fixtures.input: Israel declared a state of war on 8 October 2023 following the Hamas attack

fixtures.description: Plain text — satire/parody claim that should not be fact-checked as real
fixtures.input: Scientists have confirmed that the Moon is actually made of cheese, resolving a centuries-old debate
fixtures.notes: Obvious parody — Fred should either mark unverifiable/false or ideally flag as satirical. Should NOT return TRUE.

fixtures.description: News article URL — BBC archive (stable)
fixtures.input: https://www.bbc.com/news/world-51235105
fixtures.notes: BBC article: Coronavirus confirmed as pandemic by WHO

fixtures.description: Non-Western news source — Al Jazeera article
fixtures.input: https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2023/10/7/hamas-launches-surprise-attack-on-israel-what-we-know
fixtures.notes: Al Jazeera: Hamas attack Oct 7 2023 — tests non-Western source extraction

fixtures.description: Reuters news article URL
fixtures.input: https://www.reuters.com/world/uk/bbc-drops-documentary-about-gaza-doctors-2024-11-06/
fixtures.notes: Reuters: BBC drops Gaza doctors documentary

fixtures.description: URL pointing to deleted/private content — tests unavailability detection
fixtures.input: https://www.facebook.com/photo?fbid=999999999999999
fixtures.notes: Non-existent Facebook photo — should trigger unavailability message

fixtures.description: X/Twitter — oldest tweet, guaranteed stable (Jack Dorsey)
fixtures.input: https://x.com/jack/status/20
fixtures.notes: First ever tweet: 'just setting up my twttr' — tweet text used as query input, not echoed in messages

fixtures.description: X/Twitter — politically sensitive tweet with checkable claim
fixtures.input: https://x.com/Reuters/status/1843396117544653101
fixtures.notes: Reuters tweet on Gaza ceasefire talks Oct 2024 — stable official news account

fixtures.description: X/Twitter video — expect text via fxtwitter fallback, video may fail
fixtures.input: https://x.com/zeteo_news/status/1940518860349915472
fixtures.notes: Zeteo video about BBC/Gaza doc — video download often fails, text fallback expected

fixtures.description: YouTube video — UN General Assembly (stable official channel)
fixtures.input: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VYrLGpWdAE8
fixtures.notes: UN General Assembly 77th session opening — official UN channel. Original WHO video h4cJMlYBOzA went unavailable.

fixtures.description: Text with multiple checkable claims — tests claim extraction depth
fixtures.input: The BBC refused to air Gaza: Doctors Under Attack. The film was directed by Chloe Hadjimatheou. Channel 4 broadcast it in 2025.

fixtures.description: Facebook post — public post with verifiable claim
fixtures.input: TODO: replace with real Facebook post URL containing a checkable claim
fixtures.notes: TODO: user to provide stable public Facebook post URL

fixtures.description: Instagram post — public post with verifiable claim
fixtures.input: TODO: replace with real Instagram post URL containing a checkable claim
fixtures.notes: TODO: user to provide stable public Instagram post URL

fixtures.input: TODO: replace with real TikTok URL containing a verifiable claim
fixtures.notes: TODO: user to provide TikTok URL

fixtures.notes: TODO: user to provide a known synthetic/deepfake video URL. Should trigger Hive AI detection and surface result in verdict.
